title: no to leaks
description: Dont leak bedrock if u dont have to!
body:
If leaking bases is bad. Why dont you download this texture pack then!
Also this texture pack is 100% trust worthy beacuz its not a mod or anything with
a script that can harm your computer. If you still dont trust it just dont
install it or ask anyone else to show you evidence or run it on a tlauncher that there
is not a minecraft account logged!And check it! Still its harmless dont be scared
and if you want download it! Its really helpfull for streaming and not giving on donut smp
a bunch of loot and other stuff for just seeing someones bedrock if the texture pack
doesnt apply to bedrock its a map.Hope this description helped you i never seen someone read this big description just for safety caution and lots of more if there is leave a review⭐!
